<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/{organisation}/customers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new customer record under a specific organisation.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"organisation","in":"path","description":"Organisation slug","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"organisation"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"Customer details","required":false,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["customer"],"properties":{"customer":{"type":"object","required":["name"],"properties":{"ksuid":{"type":"string","description":"ID of the customer"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the customer."},"email":{"type":"string","description":"The email of the customer."},"phone":{"type":"string","description":"Phone number for the customer."},"bio":{"type":"string","description":"Short description or biography for the customer."},"tickets":{"type":"array","description":"List of tickets associated with the customer.","items":{"type":"object"}},"version":{"type":"integer"}},"x-internal-group":"customers","x-internal-path":"_pydantic/models","title":"CustomerObject"}},"x-internal-group":"customers","x-internal-path":"_pydantic/models","title":"CreateCustomerRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
